top_signals.title: Japan’s 2026 Wage Talks End in Third Year of Gains Above 5%
top_signals.summary: Japan’s annual wage negotiations concluded with average pay gains topping 5% for a third year, underscoring the economy’s resilience and reinforcing the Bank of Japan’s stance to keep raising interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Securitize becomes first to debut shares on NYSE and onchain, but it won’t be the last
top_signals.summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
